title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Saharsa triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Saharsa, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.

title: High stakes battle in Saharsa as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Saharsa. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Saharsa
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Saharsa assembly segment.

title: Economic survey reports positive growth in Saharsa assembly segment
snippet_text: Local growth indicators and agricultural trade volumes in Saharsa show upward trends, becoming a talking point for local candidates.
